positive: A majestic, stylized neon-lit fox sitting atop a crescent moon, surrounded by cosmic watercolor nebula patterns. The fox has an elegant, sleek silhouette, emphasized by glowing electric blue and vibrant magenta accents. The composition is highly centralized, suitable for a t-shirt print, with strong contrast between the dark indigo background and the glowing subject. Art style is a fusion of vaporwave aesthetics, clean vector lines, and detailed cosmic watercolor gradients. Clean, crisp lines, high saturation, deep depth of field, designed for apparel.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, cartoonish, photograph, photo-realistic, messy edges
